subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market: relief sent from $reliefMarket
summary: A relief fleet is underway from $reliefMarket in the $reliefSystem system, and should arrive in $marketSystem $eta.
assessment: Fleet is carrying enough food to end the shortage. If the fleet does not arrive as expected, the situation at $market will destabilize further.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market: conditions worsen
summary: While there was speculation early on that a neighboring world might be able to send relief, it appears no such aid is forthcoming.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyRelief.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market: relief fleet turned back
summary: The relief fleet from $reliefMarket was attacked on its way to $market, suffered major losses, and was forced to turn back. The food shortage contniues unabated.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyRelief.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market: relief fleet arrived
summary: The relief fleet from $reliefMarket has arrived, and the food shortage $onOrAt $market is over.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyEnd. Food prices $onOrAt $market are back to their normal levels.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market: relief fleet lost
summary: The relief fleet from $reliefMarket did not arrive at its destination, and the food shortage contniues unabated.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyRelief.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market over
summary: The report indicates that the food shortage $onOrAt $market is now over. Various factors, including strict rationing, riot-suppression measures, and the arrival of several independent traders, are all credited with ending the shortage.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyExpire. Food prices $onOrAt $market are back to their normal levels.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market over
summary: The report indicates that the food shortage $onOrAt $market is now over. The arrival of a relief fleet commaned by $playerName is credited with ending the shortage, though a local administrator was quick to point out his own contributions.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyEnd. Food prices $onOrAt $market are back to their normal levels.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market over
summary: The report indicates that the food shortage $onOrAt $market is now over. Unfortunately, much of the food relief distribution was handled by criminal elements, strengthening their position and undermining local authorities both financially and in the eyes of the population.
assessment: Unrest increased by $stabilityPenaltyEndBlack. Food prices $onOrAt $market are back to their normal levels.

subject: Food shortage $onOrAt $market over
summary: The report indicates that the food shortage $onOrAt $market is now over. The timely arrival of a relief fleet commaned by $playerName is credited with ending the shortage quickly and mitigating its long-term effects.
assessment: No unrest increase $onOrAt $market. Food prices $onOrAt $market are back to their normal levels.

assessment: If the investigation finds you involved in the smuggling, $theMarketFaction will become inhospitable towards you. $InvestigatorPost $investigatorName is charged with carrying out the investigation. You may be able to influence the outcome by contacting $invHimOrHer. The investigation will last for $duration.

subject: Smuggling investigation $onOrAt $market - convicted

subject: Lost contact with comm sniffer at $name

subject: Comm sniffer at $name traced back to you

subject: 튜토리얼 임무

subject: Acquire jump-point data at Derinkuyu
summary: Contact $dataContactName at Derinkuyu Mining Station to acquire the raw jump-point readings. Contact must be made with the transponder off as the miners of Derinkuyu have turned pirate and your fleet will be attacked otherwise.
assessment: Use "Go Dark" to avoid detection, and "Emergency Burn" to get away if you are seen.

subject: Return to Ancyra with the data
summary: Return to Ancyra and contact $mainContactPost $mainContactLastName to deliver the jump-point data.

subject: Salvage an AI core from a derelict
summary: Analyzing the jump-point data requires an AI Core. There's a Domain-era survey probe outside the orbit of Pontus. If salvaged, it's likely to yield a gamma AI core, which should be sufficient for the task.
assessment: Go to Pontus, head out towards the asteroid belt, and then use an Active Sensor Burst to locate the probe. Approach and salvage it, or pound it into scrap and scavenge through the resulting debris field. It's likely that you will have to overcome some automated defenses first.

subject: Return to Ancyra with the AI core
summary: Return to Ancyra and contact $mainContactPost $mainContactLastName to deliver the AI core.

subject: Recover derelict ships around Tetra
summary: Go to the ship graveyard around Tetra and recover as many ships as possible. Bring extra crew to man the recovered ships, and extra supplies to help restore their combat readiness.

subject: Return to Ancyra and outfit the recovered ships
summary: Return to $mainContactPost $mainContactLastName at Ancyra for help with outfitting the recovered ships with weapons.

subject: Stabilize the inner-system jump-point
summary: Use the hyperwave sequence produced by the AI core to stabilize the inner-system jump-point. You will have to defeat the pirates guarding it first.

subject: Return to Ancyra and report your success
summary: Galatia's connection with hyperspace has been restored, and trade fleets are once again able to enter and leave the system. The Derinkuyu leadership will surely soon be toppled by rank-and-file miners eager to get on the right side of the law once again.

subject: Deliver report to Jangala in the Corvus system

subject: Report delivered
summary: You have delivered the report and your standing with the Hegemony has increased substantially.
